mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_VIOLATION_REPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_VIOLATION_REPORT ( REPORT_SEQ, REPORT_CERT_NUMBER, REPORT_NAME, REPORT_MOBILE_NO, REPORT_EMAIL, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, REPORT_FILE_NAME, REPORT_ORG_FILE_NAME, REPORT_RESULT_NOTIC, REPORT_STATUS, REPORT_REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{reportSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{reportCertNumber}, #{reportName}, #{reportMobileNo}, #{reportEmail}, #{reportTitle}, #{reportContent}, #{reportFileName}, #{reportOrgFileName}, #{reportResultNotic}, 'A', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_NAME, REPORT_REG_DT, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_STATUS, REPORT_RCV_CPLT_DT, REPORT_ANSWER_DT, REPORT_ANSWER FROM NMCP_VIOLATION_REPORT WHERE REPORT_CERT_NUMBER = #{reportCertNumber} AND REPORT_NAME = #{reportName}

SELECT REPORT_SEQ , REPORT_CERT_NUMBER , REPORT_NAME , REPORT_MOBILE_NO , REPORT_EMAIL , REPORT_TITLE , REPORT_CONTENT , REPORT_FILE_NAME , REPORT_ORG_FILE_NAME , REPORT_RESULT_NOTIC , REPORT_STATUS , REPORT_REG_DT , REPORT_ANSWER_DT , REPORT_ADMIN_ID , REPORT_RCV_CPLT_DT , REPORT_ANSWER FROM NMCP_VIOLATION_REPORT WHERE REPORT_SEQ = #{reportSeq}

SELECT COUNT(BOARD_SEQ) FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND NOTI_YN = 'N' AND BOARD_SEQ NOT IN ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_WRITE_DT DESC, BOARD_SEQ DESC ) A )
SELECT COUNT(BOARD_SEQ) FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND NOTI_YN = 'Y'

SELECT BOARD_NUM, BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_CTG_SEQ, BOARD_HIT_CNT, BOARD_SUBJECT, BOARD_WRITER_NM, VIEW_YN, NOTI_YN, BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_SEQ) AS BOARD_NUM, BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_CTG_SEQ, BOARD_HIT_CNT, BOARD_SUBJECT, BOARD_WRITER_NM, VIEW_YN, NOTI_YN, TO_CHAR(BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND NOTI_YN = 'N' AND BOARD_SEQ NOT IN ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_WRITE_DT DESC, BOARD_SEQ DESC ) A )
) ORDER BY BOARD_WRITE_DT DESC, BOARD_SEQ DESC

SELECT BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_CTG_SEQ, BOARD_SUBJECT, BOARD_WRITER_NM, VIEW_YN, NOTI_YN, BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN FROM ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_CTG_SEQ, BOARD_SUBJECT, BOARD_WRITER_NM, VIEW_YN, NOTI_YN, TO_CHAR(BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_WRITE_DT DESC, BOARD_SEQ DESC ) A

SELECT BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_CTG_SEQ, BOARD_SUBJECT, BOARD_WRITER_NM, NOTI_YN, TO_CHAR(BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN, BOARD_HIT_CNT, BOARD_CONTENTS FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 93 AND BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
